focus_points.label: Shipping confidence and commitment timing.
focus_points.reason: Sam hesitates before shipping and asks for reassurance late. Could be a normal confidence dip in week three, or a tooling/expectation gap about what “ready” means—worth clarifying what specifically triggers the delay.

focus_points.label: Onboarding handoffs that still feel fuzzy.
focus_points.reason: Notes point to unclear onboarding handoffs that Sam might be compensating for. One possibility is missing context at the boundaries; worth mapping which handoffs are unclear and what decision or artifact he’s waiting on.

focus_points.label: Support touchpoints for the next two weeks.
focus_points.reason: What he would want more of from you during onboarding is a concrete, lightweight support rhythm (who to ask, when to ask, and what “done enough to ship” looks like) so he doesn’t burn time seeking reassurance late.

focus_points.label: Asking for help earlier, with the right context.
focus_points.reason: How he communicates when he’s stuck is a fast onboarding lever for juniors—getting him to share what he tried, what looks uncertain, and what decision he needs can reduce late reassurance requests without lowering quality.
